text: Being here, I feel a curious detachment from the orderly meeting room to the creative exhibit space. In the meeting room, I sense purpose and structure, but from a distance, as an observer cut off by glass. Moving into the colorful R+D exhibit, I feel my thoughts loosen—the written reflections invite me to embrace ambiguity, contemplate unknowns, and find meaning in the spaces between clarity and uncertainty. I feel both unsettled and oddly at home here, reminded that uncertainty is not merely something to fear, but a space to explore with wonder.
